title: Kryptos SecretConfig (kryptos.dev/v1)
description: Schema for a kryptos app config (tools/kryptos/configs/<app>.yaml). Provides editor autocomplete and shallow validation; deep cross-field checks live in `kryptos validate`.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in the picker.

namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace the secrets are created in.

type.description: Kubernetes Secret type. dockerconfigjson rewrites the data into a single .dockerconfigjson key from username/password fields.

filename.description: Override the generated sealed-secret filename (default: <name minus trailing -secret>-sealed-secret.yaml).

stringData.description: Static key/value data merged into the Secret (user input wins per-key in the workflow).

name.description: Secret data key. A leading underscore marks an INTERNAL field (fed into a derive, dropped from the final Secret).

help.description: Help text shown under the input.

required.description: Whether the field must have a value.

generator.description: Auto-generate a value: secure (32 alnum), strong (32 +symbols), apikey (64 hex), passphrase (4 words).

length.description: Override the generated length for the generator/keyword.

sensitive.description: Mask input and dry-run output. Absent = masked (the safe default); set false only for non-secret values like usernames.

derive.description: Compute this field instead of prompting: htpasswd (user:bcrypt of a sibling), cluster_secret (read a live Secret), render (Go text/template over siblings), jwt_secret/hmac (base64 random key), tls (self-signed cert+key into <name>.crt/.key), ssh_keypair (ed25519 pair into <name>/<name>.pub), file (read derive_path).

derive_from.description: htpasswd: sibling field whose value is bcrypt-hashed.

derive_username.description: htpasswd: username component of the user:hash line.

derive_key.description: cluster_secret: data key to read from the source Secret.

derive_template.description: render: Go text/template body; sibling values exposed as {{ .field_name }}.

derive_common_name.description: tls: X.509 subject CN (defaults to the field name).

derive_hosts.description: tls: SAN entries (DNS names, or IPs when they parse as one).

derive_comment.description: ssh_keypair: comment appended to the public key (e.g. user@host).

derive_path.description: file: path to read into this field (relative to the working dir).
